hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.mjs|*.cjs) pnpm exec oxfmt "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) pnpm exec oxlint "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
